summary: Iteration 183: All new features verified. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: Stat cards working (5 active, 1 leader, 1 suspended, 0 danger), suspended users excluded from default list, referral tree has correct light background (#f5f5f0 / rgb(245,245,240)), scheduler jobs registered.

issues: Missing API Keys modal appears on every page refresh - may need configuration but not blocking core functionality

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/admin/members/stats/overview correctly returns {active_members: 5, team_leaders: 1, suspended: 1, in_danger: 0}
Default member list query (lines 713-715 admin_routes.py) correctly excludes suspended users with is_suspended: {$ne: True}
Stat card frontend (AdminMembersPage.jsx lines 602-658) displays all 4 cards with correct data-testid attributes
Referral tree container (ReferralTreePage.jsx line 400) uses bg-[#f5f5f0] which renders as rgb(245,245,240) - light off-white
TreeNode component uses dark text classes (text-zinc-900, text-zinc-700) for readability on light background
Scheduler jobs registered in server.py lines 406-419: midday_streak_sync (12:00 UTC) and eod_streak_sync (23:30 UTC)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 183 verified: (1) Stats overview endpoint returns correct counts matching database, (2) Default member list excludes suspended users (shows 5, excludes 1 suspended), (3) Status filters work - active/suspended/deactivated options available, (4) Referral tree has light background #f5f5f0 with dark readable text, (5) Scheduler jobs for mid-day (12:00) and end-of-day (23:30) streak sync are registered. All features working correctly.

default_member_list_excludes_suspended.description: Default member list query excludes suspended/deactivated users
default_member_list_excludes_suspended.evidence: API returns 5 members in default view, 1 suspended user excluded

stat_cards_ui.description: 4 stat cards: Total Active Members, Team Leaders, Suspended Users, In Danger
stat_cards_ui.evidence: All 4 cards visible with correct data-testid attributes

referral_tree_background.description: Tree container has light/off-white background for readability

scheduler_jobs.description: Mid-day (12:00 UTC) and end-of-day (23:30 UTC) streak sync jobs
scheduler_jobs.evidence: Jobs registered in server.py startup - confirmed in code review
